pi_items.source: No evidence found to verify specific occupation.
setup_task.sh creates a CustomResourceDefinition with metadata.name "databases.platform.local".
setup_task.sh explicitly writes the blocked developer manifest to this path.
setup_task.sh explicitly writes the instructions ticket to this path.
The ticket created in setup_task.sh explicitly states: "update their manifest to use 30 days".

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for rancher_env crd_schema_evolution_validation task by confirming that the prerequisite CRD "databases.platform.local" and the instructions ticket are synthetically generated and explicitly injected via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected manifest path ("/home/ga/Desktop/billing-db.yaml") and the ticket path ("/home/ga/Desktop/TICKET-881.txt") match the task instructions, and the expected retention days (30) correctly matches the requested change in the ticket text. Additionally, discovered a critical defect: "verifier.py" is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
